rationale.ai-review: Independent Apollo agents judge milestones and issue pass/fail verdicts.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Verification runs tests, CI, similarity checks, and executable acceptance criteria.
rationale.remediation-gating: Failures trigger bounded autonomous fixes with halved budgets and exhaustion stops.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Users can pause, resume, bootstrap-reset, and asynchronously intervene.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Dashboard streams reasoning, actions, status, costs, and archived reports.
rationale.quality-debt: Observed regressions and architectural overhead empirically degraded non-security quality.
rationale.provenance-auditability: Persistent histories and archived reports support human inspection and audit.
rationale.framework: Open-source reusable orchestration architecture integrates continuous agent development stages.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented and evaluated the working framework across multiple projects.
rationale.agentic: Autonomous teams perform multi-step, milestone-scale development delivered through repository artifacts.
rationale.steering: Specifications and asynchronous user issues shape subsequent agent generation context.
rationale.risk-quality: Verification mitigation is evaluated against regressions, correctness, and similarity.
